codeSnippet.raw:
-- // Code Sample
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local CombatSystem = {}
CombatSystem.__index = CombatSystem

local DEFAULT_DAMAGE = 25
local DEFAULT_COOLDOWN = 0.6
local DEFAULT_RANGE = 10

function CombatSystem.New(Config)
	local self = setmetatable({}, CombatSystem)

	self.Damage = (Config and Config.Damage) or DEFAULT_DAMAGE
	self.Cooldown = (Config and Config.Cooldown) or DEFAULT_COOLDOWN
	self.MaxRange = (Config and Config.MaxRange) or DEFAULT_RANGE
	self.AllowFriendlyFire = Config and Config.AllowFriendlyFire or false

	self._Cooldowns = {}

	return self
end

local function IsValidCharacter(Model)
	if typeof(Model) ~= "Instance" or not Model:IsA("Model") then
		return false
	end
	local Hum = Model:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
	local Root = Model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	return Hum and Root and Hum.Health > 0
end

function CombatSystem:HandleHit(Attacker, Target)
	if not IsValidCharacter(Attacker) or not IsValidCharacter(Target) then
		return
	end

	local Now = tick()
	if Now - (self._Cooldowns[Attacker] or 0) < self.Cooldown then
		return
	end

	local AttackerRoot = Attacker.HumanoidRootPart
	local TargetRoot = Target.HumanoidRootPart
	if not AttackerRoot or not TargetRoot then
		return
	end

	local Distance = (AttackerRoot.Position - TargetRoot.Position).Magnitude
	if Distance > self.MaxRange then
		return
	end

	if not self.AllowFriendlyFire then
		local AttackerPlayer = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Attacker)
		local TargetPlayer = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(Target)
		if AttackerPlayer and TargetPlayer then
			if AttackerPlayer.Team == TargetPlayer.Team then
				return
			end
		end
	end

	local TargetHumanoid = Target:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
	if TargetHumanoid then
		TargetHumanoid:TakeDamage(self.Damage)
		self._Cooldowns[Attacker] = Now
	end
end

return CombatSystem
